"C:\Program Files\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\myShell.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\CODEBL~1\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\myShell.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\myShell.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\CODEBL~1\MinGW\bin\C__~1.EXE -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\myShell.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o myShell.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmyShell.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\myShell.dir\linkLibs.rsp
